subject: Project Management
title: Scrum Takes Off
description: A fast breakdown of Scrum Takes Off for builders.

hook.text: Of all Agile frameworks, Scrum won the adoption race — used by over 80% of Agile teams.

buildup.text: Its appeal was simplicity: three roles, five events, three artifacts. Easy to explain.

discovery.text: Scrum gave teams a structure without micromanaging — just enough process to stay aligned.

twist.text: The Certified ScrumMaster course turned Scrum into a massive training industry worth billions.

climax.text: Scrum dominated because it was the easiest Agile framework to start — even if hard to master.

punchline.text: Simple to start. A lifetime to master.

quiz.question: Why did Scrum dominate Agile adoption?
options: It was simple to explain — three roles, five events, three artifacts
It was the only Agile framework
It was mandated by the U.S. government
